---
title: "Publications"
description-meta: "Research publications by Matías Deneken."
page-navigation: true
toc: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="publications-shell site-column">
  <header class="page-header-minimal" data-lang="en">
    <h1 class="page-title-minimal">Publications</h1>
  </header>

  <header class="page-header-minimal" data-lang="es" style="display:none;">
    <h1 class="page-title-minimal">Publicaciones</h1>
  </header>

  <section class="page-wrap publications-body">
    <div class="publications-subsection">
      <h2 class="section-title-minimal">Peer-Reviewed Articles</h2>
      <ol class="apa-list">
        <li>
          Gerber, M. M., Castelo Branco, F., Cubas, V., Sáez-Fuentealba, L., de Oliveira, A. R.,
          <strong>Deneken, M.</strong>, &amp; Jackson, J. (in press).
          <a href="https://osf.io/hq3se/files/xu4fs" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Fear of the police and the fragility of legitimacy: Insights from Chile and Brazil</a>.
          <em>International Journal of Social Psychology</em>.
        </li>
        <li>
          Díaz, F., González, R., &amp; <strong>Deneken, M.</strong> (accepted with major revisions).
          How intergroup contact and social norms shape outgroup trust over time among Indigenous and non-Indigenous people.
          <em>Political Psychology</em>.
        </li>
        <li>
          Alenda, S., Sandoval, C., Somma, N., &amp; <strong>Deneken, M.</strong> (under review).
          Varieties of radical right discourse in Chile: A comparative analysis of José Antonio Kast and Johannes Kaiser.
          <em>Latin American Research Review</em>.
        </li>
        <li>
          <strong>Deneken, M.</strong> (2025).
          <a href="https://ediciones.ucsh.cl/index.php/TSUCSH/article/view/3881" target="_blank" rel="noopener">The brief history of the Center for the Study of National Reality, CEREN (1968–1973)</a>.
          <em>Revista Temas Sociológicos</em>, 37. [in Spanish]
        </li>
        <li>
          Maltrain, V., Cárdenas, J. C., Iglesias, M., &amp; <strong>Deneken, M.</strong> (2023).
          <a href="http://www.izquierdas.cl/images/pdf/2023/52/art28.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">“Camouflaged sociology” at ARCIS (1984–1991): Critique, commitment, and militancy</a>.
          <em>Revista Izquierdas</em>, 52. [in Spanish]
        </li>
      </ol>
    </div>

    <div class="publications-subsection">
      <h2 class="section-title-minimal">Books &amp; Edited Volumes</h2>
      <ol class="apa-list">
        <li>
          <strong>Deneken, M.</strong>, &amp; Valenzuela, E. (Eds.) (2025).
          <a href="https://www.catalonia.cl/libros/reconfiguraciones-interculturales/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><em>Radiografía del cambio intercultural en Chile: Dinámicas contemporáneas entre población indígena y no indígena</em></a>.
          Editorial Catalonia.
        </li>
      </ol>
    </div>

    <div class="publications-subsection">
      <h2 class="section-title-minimal">Book Chapters</h2>
      <ol class="apa-list">
        <li>
          Valenzuela, E., &amp; <strong>Deneken, M.</strong> (2025). El problema de la identificación indígena: Un análisis longitudinal. In <strong>Deneken, M.</strong> &amp; Valenzuela, E. (Eds.), <em>(Re)configuraciones interculturales</em>. Editorial Catalonia.
        </li>
        <li>
          <strong>Deneken, M.</strong> (2025). Descifrando el voto de indígenas y no indígenas en Chile en el referéndum constitucional del 4 de septiembre de 2022: Un enfoque psicosocial. In <strong>Deneken, M.</strong> &amp; Valenzuela, E. (Eds.), <em>(Re)configuraciones interculturales</em>. Editorial Catalonia.
        </li>
        <li>
          <strong>Deneken, M.</strong> (2023).
          <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/publication/374614989" target="_blank" rel="noopener">An exonerated story: The Center for the Study of National Reality (1968–1973)</a>. In Karle, C. (Ed.), <em>CEREN, an unfinished project. 50 years later</em> (pp. 23–33). Ediciones FEUC.
        </li>
      </ol>
    </div>

    <div class="publications-subsection">
      <h2 class="section-title-minimal">Working Papers</h2>
      <ol class="apa-list">
        <li>
          <strong>Deneken, M.</strong>, &amp; Díaz, F.
          <a href="https://deneken.me/indigenous-violence/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Normative opening and failed containment: Social uprising, state of exception, and justification of violence among Indigenous and non-Indigenous people in Chile (2018–2023)</a>.
        </li>
        <li>
          <strong>Deneken, M.</strong>, Navarrete, C., &amp; Parada-Contzen, M.
          <a href="https://github.com/matdknu/paper_right_fragmented" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Fragmented right and shared enemy: Social media during the presidential election in Chile</a>.
        </li>
      </ol>
    </div>

    <div class="publications-subsection">
      <h2 class="section-title-minimal">Other Publications &amp; Reports</h2>
      <ol class="apa-list">
        <li>
          Gerber, M. M., Moya, C., <strong>Deneken, M.</strong>, &amp; Cantillán, R. (2025).
          <a href="https://doi.org/10.17605/OSF.IO/X8GY" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Primer informe del Estudio Panel de Percepciones de Seguridad y Policías en Chile</a> [Technical report].
        </li>
        <li>
          <strong>Deneken, M.</strong>, Valenzuela, E., &amp; Murray, M. (2025, October 5).
          <a href="https://terceradosis.cl/2025/10/05/indigenas-y-no-indigenas-frente-al-espejo/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Indígenas y no indígenas frente al espejo</a>. <em>Tercera Dosis</em>.
        </li>
        <li>
          González-Biedma, L., <strong>Deneken, M.</strong>, &amp; González-Arias, J. (2025).
          <a href="https://ciieduc.cl/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/Revista_vol1_n1.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Quali-quantitative data collection techniques and instruments: Analysis of socioeconomic determinants for university admission in Chile</a>.
          <em>Revista Educación Iberoamericana: Investigación y Reflexión</em>, 1(1), 59–70.
        </li>
      </ol>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>
```
